flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Muskegon Community College fell 25% between 2006 and 2009 (16.9% → 12.7%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Muskegon Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.4k → $16.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Muskegon Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.5k → $7.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Muskegon Community College fell 89% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.4%).
